description_long: This is a white ceramic cup with a cylindrical body and a sturdy handle attached to one side. The front of the cup features a large yellow smiley face above bold black text that reads 'F**k You', with the asterisks censoring the word. The cup has a slightly faceted, polygonal base and rim, giving it a geometric appearance. The interior is plain and matches the exterior's white color. The surface appears smooth and glossy, typical of glazed ceramic mugs. The cup is open at the top, with no lid or cover present.
description: A white ceramic cup with a handle, featuring a yellow smiley face and bold censored text on the front. The surface is smooth and glossy, with a polygonal base and rim.
description_view_0: The handle of the cup is prominently visible on the left side, with part of the smiley face and text just coming into view.
description_view_1: The front of the cup is fully visible, displaying the yellow smiley face and the bold censored text 'F**k You' beneath it.
description_view_2: The back of the cup is shown, with no handle or decoration visible, just the plain white surface.
description_view_3: The handle is visible on the right side, and the cup's plain white surface is shown without any text or artwork.
